mapper.update: UPDATE tb_inventory SET locked_quantity = #{lockedQuantity}, available_quantity = #{availableQuantity}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}

UPDATE tb_inventory SET quantity = #{quantity}, locked_quantity = #{lockedQuantity}, available_quantity = #{availableQuantity}, last_outbound_time = NOW(), version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
